title: Write an Oban worker that returns {:snooze, seconds}
prompt: Write `MyApp.Workers.RateAwareWorker` (queue `:api`, max_attempts 20). perform/1 takes `%{"endpoint" => ep}` and calls `MyApp.API.call(ep)`. If the result is `{:error, :rate_limited, retry_after}`, return `{:snooze, retry_after}`. Otherwise `:ok` or `{:error, reason}`. Write to `lib/my_app/workers/rate_aware_worker.ex`.
tier_rationale: One branch, one symbol — the canonical snooze pattern.
